rationale: Educ. Code §7.070 governs data collection coordination for student college/career/military readiness. It is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The commissioner may enter into agreements with appropriate entities as necessary to provide for the collection of data regarding college, career, and military readiness of public school students
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and this data-collection statute.
